_comment: Claude model context windows, consumed by bin/sessions to render the CONTEXT column (N/M). Generated from https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/models/overview.md — do NOT hand-edit; refresh with the refresh-model-context-windows skill (runs in weekly maintenance). 'context' is max input tokens (the M); 'max_output' is informational. Keys are bare Claude API aliases; bin/sessions strips [1m]/-fast/-YYYYMMDD suffixes before lookup.
